arts.ttl: One Manchester United star sealed his own transfer fate in one passage of play vs Newcastle
arts.sum: United struggled against Newcastle and one player's future at the club has probably now been sealed

arts.ttl: Man United handed 'perfect £20m transfer opportunity' as Brighton plan emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United face a crucial clash against Lyon in the Europa League on Thursday night with the Reds also having one eye on the summer transfer window as well.

arts.ttl: Manchester United have a perfect alternative after controversial £7.5million transfer decision
arts.sum: Harry Amass has finally made the Man United breakthrough he has been waiting for after being given a first start by Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Andre Onana's stance on transfer exit as two stars 'desperate to leave'
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing for a huge Europa League clash against Lyon on Thursday but Ruben Amorim is also looking towards the future makeup of his squad

arts.ttl: Man United star Leny Yoro breaks his silence with cryptic 22-word message after £52m defender was blasted by Thierry Henry and Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: Yoro, 19, was the subject of a fierce rebuke by Henry as the former Arsenal star analysed United's latest dismal showing on Monday Night Football.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eyeing move for Simons
arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on RB Leipzig and Netherlands international attacking midfielder Xavi Simons, while Barcelona want to make Bayer Leverkusen centre-back Jonathan Tah their first signing of the summer. - Plans to sign RB Leipzig attacking midfielder Xavi Simons are being drawn up by Manchester United, reports the Daily Mail .

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim 'eager' to sign two new goalkeepers next season to replace Andre Onana, Altay Bayindir
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is reportedly considering two new goalkeepers this summer, after underwhelming performances from Andre Onana and Altay Bayindir.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana's true feelings on brutal Man Utd axe as summer exit option emerges
arts.sum: Andre Onana was dropped from Manchester United’s squad for their humbling defeat to Newcastle and the goalkeeper’s stance on his omission have now been revealed

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford still 'wants to play for Man United, 100%', insists Wayne Rooney - as Daniel Sturridge hails him for 'proving everyone wrong' after starring against PSG
arts.sum: The Premier League side came into the second leg at Villa Park 3-1 down after a brilliant display from Paris Saint-Germain in the French capital, needing a special comeback on the night.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals big Man Utd worry as he sends blunt Marcus Rashford transfer message
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has rediscovered some form on loan at Aston Villa but Manchester United still have the option of reintegrating the forward into their squad next season
